data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of prioritizing members in the waitlist, but the evidence does not confirm that members are prioritized over non-members. The evidence only shows that customers have entered the waitlist without any indication of their membership status or how the system handles prioritization. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding the implementation of priority tiers.
gaps: No evidence of prioritization of members over non-members in the waitlist.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify member prioritization in waitlist
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if members are prioritized in the waitlist queue.
